name: cc-svn
description: AI-driven parallel development workspace manager using SVN

skills.name: create
skills.description: Create a new SVN workspace branch for a development task
skills.prompt: Create a new SVN workspace branch. Steps: 1) Check if .svn-repo exists, 2) Generate workspace name (feature-/fix-/experiment-<description>), 3) Run: bash ./scripts/create_workspace.sh '<workspace-name>' '<description>', 4) Confirm creation and provide next steps. Always use bash to run scripts.

skills.name: merge
skills.description: Merge a workspace branch back to trunk
skills.prompt: Merge a completed workspace branch to trunk. Steps: 1) Get workspace name, 2) Show changes with: svn diff file://$(pwd)/../.svn-repo/trunk, 3) Ask for user approval, 4) If approved, run: bash ./scripts/merge_workspace.sh '<workspace-name>', 5) Clean up workspace. Always show diff before merging and get explicit user approval.

skills.name: list
skills.prompt: List all active SVN workspaces. Steps: 1) Check if .svn-repo exists, 2) Run: bash ./scripts/list_workspaces.sh, 3) Display results in user-friendly format with workspace name, creation date, status, and description. Show next steps for creating/working on/merging workspaces.
